title: Mitch Clarke (basketball)
extract: Mitchell Clarke (born 26 November 1999) is an Australian-British professional basketball player for the Newcastle Eagles of the British Super League Basketball. He played five seasons with the Perry Lakes Hawks in the NBL1 West before joining the Perth Wildcats of the Australian National Basketball League (NBL) in 2021, where he spent two seasons with their extended squad. He played for the Bendigo Braves of the NBL1 South in 2022 before returning to the Hawks in 2023. After a season with the Reading Rockets of the NBL England Division 1, he re-joined Bendigo in 2024.
